title: Peppery Crispy Chinese Basil Bake
description: A festive and flavorful vegan dish featuring crispy Chinese basil, this bake is perfect for any occasion. It combines the peppery taste of basil with crunchy textures and savory spices.

ingredients.name: Soy sauce
ingredients.notes: Use gluten-free soy sauce for gluten-free diet

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together rice vinegar, sesame oil, soy sauce, and cornstarch until smooth.
Add the cubed tofu to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the marinade.
Let the tofu marinate for at least 15 minutes, flipping halfway through.
In a separate bowl, mix together Panko breadcrumbs, black pepper, and salt.
Remove the tofu from the marinade, allowing any excess to drip off.
Coat each piece of tofu in the breadcrumb mixture, pressing gently to adhere.
Place the coated tofu on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the tofu in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
While the tofu is baking, prepare the Chinese basil by washing and drying the leaves.
Once the tofu is done, remove it from the oven and top with Chinese basil leaves.
Return the baking sheet to the oven and bake for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the basil is crispy.
